title: [Zrenigotham House, Sitting Room]
description: Moonlight filters through a large mahogany-framed window with built-in seating, casting a silver glow across the sitting room.  Lamps latticed with thin silver metalwork are placed about, joined by a small stone fireplace as a source of ambience in the cozy area. A padded pale ivory silk settee and two armchairs invite rest, while a glass-topped sidetable awaits nearby.  Bookcases line the walls, brimming with literary gems, and fresh flowers add subtle color.  A winding staircase offers access to the upper level and a set of glass-paneled doors open up to an arched hallway.
room.location: Zrenigotham House, inside the frontier town of Wehnimer's Landing
